demoHint: 💡 Demo: use any email and a 6+ character password
serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
registerEmailExists: An account already exists with this email

passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

passwordRequirements: Password must have at least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase and a number.

resetPasswordMessage: Your password has been changed successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
